# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# look Family Zoo By Sharpee Tutorial Type HELP for instructions. Zoo Entrance
#   You stand before the wrought-iron gates of the Willowbrook Family Zoo.
> look
# examine sign A brightly painted wooden sign reads: "WELCOME TO WILLOWBROOK
#   FAMILY ZOO."
> examine sign
# examine booth A small wooden booth with a "Self-Guided Tours" sign.
> examine booth
# take sign welcome sign is fixed in place.
> take sign
# look Zoo Entrance You stand before the wrought-iron gates of the Willowbrook
#   Family Zoo.
> look
